titleStmt.title: SII 30.96: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 96. (A.R. No. 173 of 1915.) Tirumukkūḍal, Madhurantakam Taluk, Chingleput District Veṅkaṭēśa Pērumāḷ temple-on the south wall of the same shrine Kulōttuṅga-Chōḷa I: Year 5: 1075 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription registers the exemption of taxes for the lands at Kūḍalūr, near Tirumukkūḍal by the sabhā of Śri Madhurāntakach-chaturvēdimaṅgalam a taṉiyūr in Kaḷattūr-kōṭṭam, a sub-division of Jayaṅkoṇḍasōḻa-maṇḍalam, except those already allotted as maḍappuṟam, flower garden (nandavānappuṟam) and other lands. The said land was gifted by the general Dharmiyaṉ Vaḍuganāthaṉ alias Vīrarājēndra Dharmapālar after purchase. The sabhā received 500 kāśu from the donor as deposit towards taxes of that land. At the bidding of the twelve brāhmaṇas who represented their wards, the transaction was ordered to be engraved on stone and copperplate.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pukaḻmātu viḷaṅka cayamātu virumpa nilamakaḷ malara malarmakaḷ puṇarntu Urimaiyil ciṟan=ta maṇimuṭicūṭi tikkanaittum tancakkara naṭātti vijaiyābhiṣekam paṇṇi vīrasimhāsanattu puvana muḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya korājakecari panmarāna Uṭaiyār śrīkulottuṅkacoḻa tevaṟku yāṇṭu Aiñcāvatu jayaṅko
ṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu kaḷattūrk koṭṭattut taniyūr śrī maturāntakac catuppetimaṅkalattup peruṅkuṟi sabhaiyom Eḻuttu nammūr tirumukkūṭal Āḻvārukku Iṟaiyiliyāka nammūr vaṭapiṭākait tirumukkūṭalppāṟ kūṭalūril maṭappuṟamun tirunantavanappuṟamum Ākappon Irukaḻañcaraiyāl vanta nilamum Ivvūril munpu Iṟaiyiliyāl Uḷḷa nilamum nikki Iṟainilattil paṇṭārap pottakappaṭit 3 tarattin
kiḻvanta Iṟainilamāy Uḷḷa poṉnukku Aṭutta nilamellām Iṟaiyiliyākak kuṭuttu Innilattukku Iṟaikkuc celavāka tarmiyan vaṭukanātanāna seṉāpatikaḷ virarājentrat tanmapālar Ivvāḻvār koyilile tām veṇṭun tanmañ ceyya Ivariṭai nāṅkaḷ koṇṭa kācu 5 100 Ainnūṟuṅ koṇṭu Ivvūrkku vanta peruvariyuñ cilliṟaic coṟumāṭṭum Eccoṟṟukkūṟṟu ne
l veṭṭimuṭṭaiyāḷum velikkācuḷḷiṭṭum Antarāyamum Uḷḷiṭṭu maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭa Iṟaiyum nāṅkaḷe Iṟuttuk kuṭukkak kaṭavomākavum Ivvūr cantirātittavaṟ Iṟaiiliyāvatākavum Ippaṭi Ivvāḻvān koyilile cempiluṅ kallilum veṭṭuvittuk kuṭukkak kaṭavomākavuñ camaittuk kuṭuttom peruṅkuṟi sabhaiyom paṇittār śrīmadhurāntakacceri Irāyū
rccoṭṭai dāmodarabhaṭṭarum śrīparāntakacceri Ālikkonṟait tiruvaraṅkak kiramavittarum Irumuṭiccoḻacceri Iḻakkantiṟattu poṟeva bhaṭṭar makan Aruḷāḷa bhaṭṭarum ciṅkaḷāntakaccerik kāñcikkuṟi bhavanan=tikkiramavittarum śrīviracoḻaccerip pippirai nārāyaṇa bhaṭṭa sarvvakṛtu vājapeyayājiyārum śrīkotaṇṭarāmaceri prayākaic civakumāra bhaṭṭarum śrīparakesaricceri vaṟṟalūr nārāyaṇa bha
ṭṭarum śrī rājakesaricceri mayin=takkuṟi svāmi kumāra vasan=tayājiyārum śrīcūracūḷāmaṇicceri vaṟṟalūrt tuṟkay bhaṭṭarum śrīmānakulāsanacceri ninṟaiyil colaippirān bhaṭṭarum śrī viraśikhāmracari vaṅkippuṟattuk kuṉṟaya sahasrarum śrītribhuvanamāteviccerip putuppaṭṭanattut taṇiyamalai bhaṭṭarum paṇikkap paṇiyāl caṭaiyan Amararkaḷ cuntaranāṉa brahmavridhan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai
dāmodarabhaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Aruḷāḷa bhaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai bhavanan=tik kiramavittaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai mayintakkuṟi svāmikumāra vasantayāji Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kunṟaya sahasran Eḻuttu Ippaṭikkut taṇiyamalai bhaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku nārāyaṇasya vājapeyayājiyen likhitam Ippaṭikku Ivai bhutivriṣṇasomayā
ji Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai dakṣiṇāmurtti Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Aṉanta nārāyaṇa bhaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Udayadivākarasa [ rvvādityan] Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai makaśirai śrīvāsutevan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai korovi sarvvadevan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Araṇaippuṟattu śrīvaradhan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai cūṟṟi comācieḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai pevaṇṇan Āṭavalān Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 30.96 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
